steps.title: Substitute the ratio
steps.content:
From $\frac{x}{y}=4$, substitute directly into the second equation:
$$\frac{3x}{ty}=\frac{3}{t}\cdot\frac{x}{y}$$
$$\frac{3}{t}\cdot4=24$$

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: The value of $t$ is $\frac{1}{2}$, which matches choice A. The answer is A.
